content.full_text:
July 11, 2001

Karl Mohr, Finance Director  
City of Davis  
23 Russell Boulevard  
Davis, CA 95616  

Re: Your Request for Advice  
Our File No. W-01-067  

Dear Mr. Mohr:

Pursuant to our March 30, 2001, telephone conversation, your request for formal advice is withdrawn. Please do not hesitate to contact me at (916) 322-7771 if you have any additional questions relating to the Political Reform Act.

Sincerely,

Natalie Bocanegra  
Staff Counsel, Legal Division
